blended.narrative: Killington is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 49°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
